stories.title: Joey Wiemer Ties Carlos Delgado's MLB Record — 10 Consecutive Plate Appearances Reaching Base to Start a Season (Tier 1)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Joey Wiemer reached base in his first 10 plate appearances of the season.

8-for-8 plus 2 walks. Averaging over 100 mph exit velocity.

That ties Carlos Delgado's 2002 record for the longest out-free start to a season in the live-ball era. #Nationals

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
The Giants released Joey Wiemer before the season.

He then went 8-for-8 with 2 walks to start the year — tying a record from 2002 for the longest out-free start in the live-ball era.

Baseball is something else. #Nationals

article.headline: Joey Wiemer Ties Live-Ball Era Record With 10 Consecutive Plate Appearances Reaching Base

image_concepts.raw:

stories.title: Konnor Griffin's MLB Debut — Teen SS Makes Pirates History at PNC Park (Tier 1)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Konnor Griffin. 19 years old. First MLB at-bat.

RBI double.

He went 2-for-3 with a walk in front of 38,986 fans at PNC Park. The first teenager to play shortstop in MLB since Alex Rodriguez in 1994. #LetsGoBucs

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Opening week rookie class check:

Konnor Griffin — RBI double on first MLB pitch seen
Chase DeLauter — 5 HR in 8 games
Munetaka Murakami — 4 HR in 8 games

The 2026 class is not messing around.

article.headline: Konnor Griffin's MLB Debut: RBI Double, Sellout Crowd, First Teen SS Since A-Rod in 1994

stories.title: Chase DeLauter — 5 HRs in First 8 Games, Historic Rookie Start (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Chase DeLauter has 5 home runs in his first 8 MLB games.

The last player with 4 HRs in his first 3 games? Trevor Story in 2016.

DeLauter is batting .346 with an OPS above 1.290. The Guardians rookie is absolutely mashing. #Guardians

article.headline: Chase DeLauter Has 5 HRs in His First 8 Games — One of the Most Historic Rookie Starts in Years

stories.title: Mookie Betts Exits with Oblique Strain, Juan Soto Calf Strain — Early Injury Wave (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
One week in and the IL is already busy:

❌ Mookie Betts — oblique strain, 4-6 weeks
❌ Juan Soto — calf strain, day-to-day
❌ Justin Verlander — hip inflammation, 2 weeks

Three marquee names down in April. This is going to be a long season for a few teams.

article.headline: Betts, Soto, Verlander: Three Stars on the IL Before the Season's First Week Is Over

stories.title: Aaron Judge — 371st Career HR, Now Sole Owner of 83rd All-Time (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Aaron Judge hit career home run No. 371 on Opening Night at Yankee Stadium.

That moves him past Hall of Famer Gil Hodges into sole possession of 83rd on the all-time list.

The Yankees are 6-1. Judge is locked in. #Yankees

article.headline: Aaron Judge Hits HR No. 371, Passes Gil Hodges on Baseball's All-Time List

stories.title: Munetaka Murakami — 4 HRs in 8 Games, Japanese-Born Milestone (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Munetaka Murakami has hit 4 home runs in his first 8 MLB games.

That is the most by a Japanese-born player in their first 8 games in major league history.

NPB to MLB. No adjustment period needed. #WhiteSox

stories.title: Early Standings / Week 1 Wrap — Yankees Lead AL East, Brewers Surge (Tier 3)

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
MLB standings after one week:

🔥 Hot: Yankees 6-1, Astros 6-3, Brewers off to a strong start
🥶 Cold: Red Sox, A's, White Sox near the bottom early

It is a long season — but the Yankees look serious. #MLB
